name: Monterey Chili Con Carne
recipeIngredient: 15.5 ounces dark red kidney beans, drained and washed
1/4 cup low-fat Monterey Jack cheese, grated
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat.
2. Add chicken, onions, bell peppers, and garlic to the skillet.
3. Cook until the chicken is no longer pink and vegetables are tender.
4. Stir in crushed tomatoes, kidney beans, chili powder, and cumin.
5. Simmer, covered, for 35 minutes.
6. Sprinkle with cheese and serve.
